title: Should Orbital be built as a SaaS product for product teams?
description: Orbital implements the Mental Model Shift as a Claude Code agent team. The question is whether this has SaaS potential — is the orbital model something other product teams would pay for, or is it inherently a personal power tool?

assumptions.content: Product teams are frustrated with sequential handoff models
AI agent teams are mature enough for production product work
Teams would trust AI-generated evidence for product decisions

success_signals: 5+ product leaders express willingness to pay after demo
Orbital produces a decision package that matches or exceeds manual team output quality
kill_signals: Product leaders see this as a toy, not a tool
Agent output quality is too low for real decision-making
